mapper.insert: insert into post_counter_snapshot( post_id, view_count, like_count, comment_count, bookmark_count ) values( #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{bookmarkCount} ) on duplicate key update view_count = values(view_count), like_count = values(like_count), comment_count = values(comment_count), bookmark_count = values(bookmark_count)

insert into post_score_snapshot( post_id, score, rank_version ) values( #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{score}, #{rankVersion} ) on duplicate key update score = values(score), rank_version = values(rank_version)
